display.purpose: Homepage headline only — 'Welcome to Revtown.' Never used in the catalog.

headline.purpose: Dark CTA section titles and large section headings.

title.purpose: Page title in Agent Hub header and section subheadings.

body.purpose: All descriptive text. Max 65ch on prose surfaces.

label.purpose: All technical identifiers: agent names, filter pills, status badges, check counts, CRM chips, stats.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Applied on .agent-card:hover only, paired with border-color darkening. State change, not decoration.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for color, border-color, opacity, box-shadow.

motion.name: slow
motion.purpose: Card hover transitions where the state change warrants slightly more time.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Nav links hidden, single-column grid, reduced padding.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Used for 'Get Started Free', 'Browse agents', 'Run →', 'Contributing guide'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; border: none; background: oklch(57% 0.14 35); color: oklch(93% 0.01 52); transition: background 0.12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(49% 0.13 35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(57% 0.14 35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Used alongside primary buttons for 'Open dashboard', 'View on GitHub'.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(57% 0.14 35); border: 1px solid oklch(57% 0.14 35 / 0.35); transition: all 0.12s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: oklch(57% 0.14 35); background: oklch(96% 0.025 45); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(57% 0.14 35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Catalog filter controls. Default and active states. Pill radius only for these — not for buttons.
components.css: .ds-filter-pill { padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10.5px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 50); background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 52); color: oklch(46% 0.01 50); transition: all 0.12s; } .ds-filter-pill:hover { color: oklch(17% 0.012 50); border-color: oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.18); } .ds-filter-pill--active { background: oklch(96% 0.025 45); border-color: oklch(57% 0.14 35 / 0.35); color: oklch(57% 0.14 35); } .ds-filter-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(57% 0.14 35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Agent Card
components.description: The signature component. Docker Hub-style: domain avatar, agent name + namespace, status pill, description, actions, footer tray.
components.html:
DQ
le-data-quality
revtown/core
live

Audits contacts and companies for missing critical fields. Generates a CRM health score.

Run →Fork
hubspot
7 checks
components.css: .ds-agent-card { background: oklch(99.5% 0.004 52); border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 50); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 300px; transition: box-shadow 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-agent-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 12px oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.07); border-color: oklch(79% 0.01 50); } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px 18px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; } .ds-agent-avatar { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-title { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding-top: 2px; } .ds-agent-name { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(17% 0.012 50); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-agent-ns { font-size: 11px; color: oklch(70% 0.008 50); margin-top: 1px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; } .ds-status-pill { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap; margin-top: 1px; } .ds-status-live { background: oklch(52% 0.11 148 / 0.1); color: oklch(44% 0.1 148); border: 1px solid oklch(52% 0.11 148 / 0.2); } .ds-status-soon { background: oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.04); color: oklch(46% 0.01 50); border: 1px solid oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.08); } .ds-status-planned { background: transparent; color: oklch(70% 0.008 50); border: 1px solid oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.06); } .ds-agent-desc { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; color: oklch(46% 0.01 50); line-height: 1.55; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-actions { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-action-run { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 5px; text-decoration: none; background: oklch(57% 0.14 35); color: oklch(93% 0.01 52); border: none; transition: background 0.12s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; } .ds-action-run:hover { background: oklch(49% 0.13 35); } .ds-action-ghost { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 5px; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(46% 0.01 50); border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 50); transition: all 0.12s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; } .ds-action-ghost:hover { color: oklch(17% 0.012 50); border-color: oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.2); } .ds-card-footer { padding: 9px 18px; border-top: 1px solid oklch(93% 0.007 52); background: oklch(99% 0.005 52); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-crm-chips { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-crm-chip { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9.5px; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 50); color: oklch(70% 0.008 50); } .ds-check-stat { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(70% 0.008 50); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Four states: live (green), beta (terracotta), soon (grey), planned (ghost). Appears inside agent cards only.
components.html: livebetacoming soonplanned
components.css: .ds-sp { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 4px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-sp-live { background: oklch(52% 0.11 148 / 0.1); color: oklch(44% 0.1 148); border: 1px solid oklch(52% 0.11 148 / 0.2); } .ds-sp-beta { background: oklch(57% 0.14 35 / 0.08); color: oklch(49% 0.13 35); border: 1px solid oklch(57% 0.14 35 / 0.2); } .ds-sp-soon { background: oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.04); color: oklch(46% 0.01 50); border: 1px solid oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.08); } .ds-sp-planned { background: transparent; color: oklch(70% 0.008 50); border: 1px solid oklch(17% 0.012 50 / 0.06); }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top nav. Blur-backed, near-opaque. Logo left, links center, CTA right. Links collapse on mobile.
components.html:
Revtown
  • Agent Hub
  • GitHub
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 32px; height: 54px; background: oklch(97% 0.008 52 / 0.96); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(90% 0.008 50); } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-wordmark { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-re { color: oklch(57% 0.14 35); } .ds-town { color: oklch(17% 0.012 50); } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; list-style: none; } .ds-nav-links a { color: oklch(46% 0.01 50); text-decoration: none; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.12s; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: oklch(17% 0.012 50); }

narrative.overview:
RevTown's visual system is built around a single premise: the catalog is the product. There is no pitch, no funnel, no hero section explaining why CRM hygiene matters. You browse agents, pull one, run it — the same interaction model as Docker Hub. Every surface decision follows that logic: identify what's decorative, remove it, document what remains.

The typeface split defines the experience. Cormorant Garamond carries section headers and the homepage headline. The moment you enter the Agent Hub, JetBrains Mono takes over: agent names, filter pills, status badges, check counts, CRM chips. The terminal shift is intentional.

Colors are restrained. Warm Terracotta is the only accent. Every background is tinted warm (hue 52), never pure white. This system explicitly rejects LLM-default aesthetics: gradient blobs, hero metrics, glassmorphism, 'ten-x your pipeline' copy.
keyCharacteristics: Catalog-first density: the Agent Hub is the product, not a feature page
Terminal shift: JetBrains Mono dominates the catalog; Cormorant belongs to headings only
Warm throughout: every surface tinted toward hue 52, from card white to near-black footer
Flat by default: no ambient shadows — only a border shift and minimal elevation on hover
One accent, used sparingly: Warm Terracotta on 10% or less of any given screen

rules.name: The Terracotta Rule
rules.body: Warm Terracotta is the only accent color. It appears on 10% or less of any screen. Do not introduce a second accent. Secondary emphasis is achieved through weight, size, or mono font shift — not color.

rules.name: The No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Every neutral must be tinted toward hue 52, chroma 0.004 or more. Pure oklch(100% 0 0) is prohibited. If a surface looks grey, it is the wrong color.

rules.name: The Hue-Lock Rule
rules.body: All neutrals — light and dark — share hue 50–52. The palette reads as one continuous temperature. Never use a cool grey alongside the warm neutrals.

rules.name: The Terminal Shift Rule
rules.body: The moment a user enters the Agent Hub, Cormorant yields to JetBrains Mono. Agent names, filter labels, status pills, and all catalog metadata render in mono. Cormorant does not appear in the catalog grid.

rules.name: The Scale Ratio Rule
rules.body: A minimum 1.3x ratio between adjacent hierarchy steps. Flat type scales are prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The single hover shadow is a state signal, not an aesthetic. Ambient shadows on cards, panels, or nav elements are prohibited.

dos: Use Warm Terracotta exclusively on interactive elements: primary buttons, active filter states, Run actions, the Rev wordmark, and hover text links.
Use JetBrains Mono for every technical identifier in the catalog: agent names, filter pills, status pills, CRM chips, check counts, hub stats, code blocks.
Tint every neutral toward hue 50–52 in OKLCH. No pure white, no cool grey.
Use OKLCH for all color declarations. The warm-tinting logic depends on consistent hue and chroma.
Differentiate card states visually: live cards show Run/Fork actions; soon cards show Request early access; planned cards show nothing below the description.
Keep card hover minimal: border color shift plus 0 2px 12px shadow only.
Cap body copy line length at 65ch on prose surfaces.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Prohibited in all contexts.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored side stripe on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't use glassmorphism as decoration. The nav uses backdrop blur functionally — that is the only permitted use.
Don't reproduce the hero-metric template: big number, small label, grid of stats.
Don't use generic AI product aesthetics: gradient blobs, neon accents, purple/blue/glass combinations.
Don't design to look like it was generated — sloppy spacing, unrefined proportions, every component at the same visual weight.
Don't use pure oklch(100% 0 0) or oklch(0% 0 0) anywhere. Every neutral carries warmth.
Don't introduce a second accent color. Commit Green is for status signaling only.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, padding, margin). Transition color, opacity, box-shadow, and border-color only.
Don't use em dashes in copy.
